Classic Auto Body

Trusted Collision Repair in Columbus. Family-owned. 100% recommended.

Get a Free Estimate (812) 372-9360

What We Do

Our Services

Collision Repair

Complete collision repair services to restore your vehicle to pre-accident condition. We work with all insurance companies.

Auto Painting

Professional auto painting and refinishing. Factory-match color blending for a seamless finish every time.

Frame Straightening

Precision frame and unibody straightening using computerized measuring systems for accurate repairs.

Dent Removal

Expert dent repair for minor dings to major damage. Paintless dent removal available for qualifying vehicles.

How It Works

Our Process

01

Assess

We inspect every inch of damage, document it, and coordinate directly with your insurance company.

02

Estimate

You get a detailed, transparent estimate -- no hidden fees, no surprises. We explain every line item.

03

Repair

Our technicians restore your vehicle to pre-accident condition using factory-match materials and precision tools.

04

Deliver

Your vehicle is returned looking brand new, backed by our quality guarantee. You won't believe the difference.

01

We inspect every inch of damage, document it, and coordinate directly with your insurance company.

You get a detailed, transparent estimate -- no hidden fees, no surprises. We explain every line item.

Repair

04

Deliver

Your vehicle is returned looking brand new, backed by our quality guarantee. You won't believe the difference.

Testimonials

75+ five-star reviews. 100% recommendation rate. Don't take our word for it.

Classic Auto Body did an amazing job on my car. You can't even tell it was in an accident. Highly recommend!
